archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) with Editorial Luxury twist
design_philosophy: High-end, minimalist, trendy, and creative. Moroccan modernism: warm, inviting, premium, cultural but clean. Emphasize negative space, tactile surfaces, and editorial typography.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-heading font-medium
scale.overline: text-xs font-body uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-muted

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.auth_layout: Split screen or elegant centered modal. Left side image/texture, right side clean form with ample padding (p-12).
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A6984] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform shadow-sm font-medium text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1C1917] border border-[#E7E5DF] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-[#F5F3EE] transition-colors text-sm
buttons.ghost: text-[#57534E] hover:text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#EFECE5] rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E7E5DF] shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] p-6 transition-all hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)]

inputs.base: w-full bg-[#F5F3EE] border-transparent rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base focus:bg-white focus:border-[#4A6984] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4A6984] transition-all placeholder:text-[#A8A29E]

sidebar.base: w-64 bg-[#F5F3EE] border-r border-[#E7E5DF] flex flex-col h-screen p-6

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for list items and cards (framer-motion).

landing_hero.description: Moroccan Riad courtyard, minimalist design. Use for Landing Page hero background.

auth_background.description: Abstract minimalist background, warm textured plaster wall. Use for Auth pages split-screen side.

itinerary_hero.description: Marrakech medina street at golden hour. Use as background for the 'AI-generated itinerary' hero card in the dashboard.

guide_avatar_1.description: Portrait of a friendly Moroccan local guide. Use in the 'Guides near you' list.

tourist_avatar.description: User profile avatar for the tourist.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building Phase A: Tourist Dashboard + Auth UX + Landing Page refresh.
Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Do not use generic Shadcn Card/Section if it restricts creativity. Build custom layout components where needed for the dashboard bento grid.
Dashboard layout must have a left sidebar and a main content area with a breadcrumb.
Hero Itinerary Card: Must feature the `itinerary_hero` image with a dark gradient overlay so text is readable (bg-black/40). Include a glassmorphism badge for 'AI-Generated'.
Use framer-motion for simple page transitions and staggered list reveals.
Auth pages should be sleek: Split layout with the `auth_background` image on one side, and a clean, centered form on the other.
